title: Incremental refresh/sync + retraction/removed-from-OA handling
context: PMC OA changes over time: new articles are added, existing articles are updated, and — critically — some articles are retracted or removed from the OA subset. A corpus that does not handle retractions will silently retain withdrawn content in redistributable bundles, which is a compliance and accuracy failure. This task implements an incremental sync that detects changes vs the prior pinned snapshot and re-runs the gate on affected articles, with retracted/removed articles removed from bundles and kept metadata-only with a recorded reason. Depends on snapshot-009 (pinned ingestion) and fullbuild-010 (the prior snapshot to diff against).
objective: Implement the incremental refresh/sync process that detects new, updated, retracted, and removed-from-OA articles vs the prior snapshot, re-runs the gate on changes, removes retracted/removed articles from redistributable bundles (keeping them metadata-only with reason), and emits a release changelog with a new manifest hash.
acceptanceCriteria: Incremental sync compares the new PMC OA / Europe PMC OA snapshot against the prior pinned snapshot and detects: new articles (added), updated articles (changed metadata or license), retracted articles (PMID/PMCID in retraction watch or service retraction list), and articles removed from the OA subset.

Retracted or removed-from-OA articles are removed from all redistributable bundles; their canonical record is updated to exclusion {excluded:true, reason:'retracted'|'removed-from-oa'} and kept as metadata-only with the reason recorded.
Gate-002 re-runs on all changed articles; any article whose license changed since the prior snapshot is re-tiered.
A release changelog is emitted: listing added, updated, retracted, and removed articles with their prior and new status; a new manifest content hash is recorded for the updated corpus.
Build is deterministic from the new pinned snapshot; independent rebuild reproduces the manifest hash.
Code MIT licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commit is DCO signed-off.
resources: NCBI Retraction Watch integration / PMC retraction list
PMC OA file list change detection documentation
output: A merged PR adding the incremental sync module (TypeScript/ESM): change detection, retraction/removal handling, gate re-run on changes, changelog emission, and updated manifest hash recording.
